_note: Moonlight Sonata Nightmare (piece 9B, 180.83 s) — REWORKED Four-Seasons style. MOONRISE silver/indigo 3.25-19 (narrow slow moonbeams, tilt high) -> moonlight develops 20-59 (indigo/silver rotation, violet creeps in at 45) -> REG CLIMAX 60-70 (silver-white swell, fan up) -> collapse, BREAK 75 near-dark -> PURPLE TENSION 80-100 (violet/magenta pulsing build, movement accelerating) -> NIGHTMARE DROP 101.25 (ELECTRIC cyan blast, strobe 0.7) -> electric storm 104-123 cyan/magenta/electric-blue colliding fast (white-lift hit 115) -> COLOUR SLAMS on measured bass hits: 125 magenta / 135 electric-blue / 140 cyan -> RE-DROPS each with own colour: 145.25 cyan / 155.25 magenta / 164.25 white-violet (biggest) -> wind-down 168.5 silver moonbeams -> indigo fade, out 180.5. Times from band-split analysis. Strobe at 101.25/145.25/155.25/164.25 only. Mirrored pairs; right pan = 1 - left.
